overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a narrow dirt path at night beside a stone cliff wall, holding a lit torch that provides the primary illumination. The character continues walking as the torch is lowered or extinguished around the 8-second mark, significantly darkening the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail with stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, holding a lit torch in the left hand to illuminate the stone wall on the right

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with rough texture running alongside the path
wooden torch held in left hand providing warm flickering light
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass
green grass and vegetation on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cliffside trail at night, with a stone wall on the right and open darkness on the left. The lit torch illuminates the immediate path ahead, casting warm light on the dirt trail and rocky wall.

events.description: torch is lowered or moved out of frame, significantly reducing visibility and plunging the scene into darkness
torch briefly swings back into view, temporarily illuminating the path before disappearing again

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the dark path with the torch lowered or extinguished from view

entered.detail: torch briefly reappears in hand around 11 seconds before disappearing again

segments.scene_description: The scene darkens considerably as the torch disappears from view around 8 seconds, leaving only ambient moonlight to illuminate the path. The torch briefly reappears around 11 seconds, casting light once more before being lowered again as the character continues along the dark cliffside trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow cliffside trail that shifts from warm, torch-lit visibility to oppressive nocturnal darkness. It begins with the camera moving forward beside a stone wall, where a lit torch casts a bright, flickering glow across the dirt path and rocky textures. As the character progresses, the light suddenly vanishes from view, plunging the environment into deep shadow where only faint ambient moonlight reveals the path. The scene briefly brightens as the torch reappears to illuminate the cliffside once more before it is lowered again, leaving the camera to advance through the remaining darkness.
